html:
Exclusive to:  

The Ice Flingomatic is a craftable Structure from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 2 Gears, 15 Ice, and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Ice Flingomatic can be turned on and off by the player. When turned on, the Ice Flingomatic will automatically launch snowballs to extinguish any smoldering objects or Fires, within its range. This also includes Campfires, Fire Pits, Night Lights, and Endothermic Fires. It will not target players holding Torches (or Willow's Lighter).

The Ice Flingomatic has a limited fuel tank, indicated by a red gauge on the front of the unit. A full tank will last 5 days and can be refueled with any fuel substances, such as Logs (9%) or Rot (3%), as well as Nitre (19%), Glommer's Goop (50%). As long as the Ice Flingomatic is turned on, it will consume fuel over time. Extinguishing fires and reviving withered plants do not consume additional fuel.

The Ice Flingomatic will target Farms and withered Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, and Saplings, allowing them to be harvested normally throughout Summer.

Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Ice Flingomatic can be flooded.

In the Hamlet DLC, Wormwood can be frozen by Ice Flingomatics.

Tips

  • Since structures can catch on fire during Summer, a Flingomatic can safeguard one's most important structures (e.g. Chests). However careful planning is required so that the Fire Pits and Endothermic Fire Pits are not inside the Flingomatic's area.
  • The Ice Flingomatic can lob snowballs over all types of Walls.
  • The Ice Flingomatic will instantly freeze Mobs that are hit by the Snowballs. Players can exploit this to their advantage and stunlock mobs.
  • Activating the Ice Flingomatic before leaving the area in the Summer will prevent fires from starting or spreading upon return.
  • The Ice Flingomatic's range is a 9 tile diameter (from the center of the 4th tile across). This applies in both the horizontal and vertical direction (Also about 2 tiles diagonally from center).
  • When placing Plants around a base, one should position them so that an Ice Flingomatic can function as a sprinkler during the Summer, maintaining them as renewable resources and protecting them from spontaneous combustion.
  • Despite the high cost of construction and operation, the machine cannot put out extensive fires by itself, requiring more than one.
  • Having a pre-built Flingomatic in a player's Science tab will allow a player to measure the range of an already placed Flingomatic at any time. This can be done by selecting it from the Science tab and hovering over the placed Flingomatic. When finished, right-clicking will cancel the placement of the new one.
  • The Ice Flingomatic can fail to stop crops from withering during Summer if they are planted in quick succession. The problem can be avoided by waiting for the Ice Flingomatic's animation to complete between each Seed when planting multiple Seeds.

Bugs

  • Sometimes when plants such as Berry Bushes are placed too close to the Ocean, the snowballs launched by the machine won't be able to land.
  • Sometimes, when harvesting a plant, the Ice Flingomatic will fire snowballs at it indefinitely.
    • This may also result in a column of snowballs traveling through the world in a straight direction.
  • Sometimes the Ice Flingomatic stops throwing snowballs at withered plants. Relogging usually fixes this issue.
  • An Ice Flingomatic may auto target Limpet Rocks and never target anything else.
  • Thrown snowballs can sometimes get stuck in the air. This typically affects a single snowball from a stream, so the Ice Flingomatic should still be able to put out fires.
  • Tree seeds extinguished by Ice Flingomatic planted automatically on save/load.

Gallery

  • Ice Flingomatic's building silhouette showing that its radius is 11 units of wall.
  • Approximate total snowball splash area
  • A turned off Ice Flingomatic that has used some fuel.
  • An Ice Flingomatic throwing snowballs at two burning Drying Racks.
  • The Flingomatic being used to freeze mobs near a fire.
  • A Flingomatic in Emergency Mode detecting and subsequently automatically attempting to extinguish a group of burning Saplings in DST. Note the red light when responding to the emergency instead of the normal green one.

Don't Starve
Together
Exclusive to:
Ice Flingomatic
"Saves plants, puts out fires, fueled by flame."
Object Info
Perk
Extinguishes fires
Revives withering plants
5 Days.
Source
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×2 ×15 ×2
Tab
Tier
Miscellaneous
"firesuppressor"
“Fling on!”
–Wilson, examining when turned on.
“I wish you'd shut your lid and stop putting out fires.”
–Willow, examining when turned on.
“I can throw better.”
–Wolfgang, examining when turned on.
“I don't know why you bother. We're all going to burn.”
–Wendy, examining when turned on.
“FRIEND IS WHIRRING”
–WX-78, examining when turned on.
“Pitch that ice!”
–Wickerbottom, examining when turned on.
“Save the trees!”
–Woodie, examining when turned on.
“Begone, fire!”
–Maxwell, examining when turned on.
“Primed for fire fighting!”
–Wagstaff, examining when turned on.
“Catapult engaged för battle!”
–Wigfrid, examining when turned on.
“This would come in handy in a snowball fight.”
–Webber, examining when turned on.
“Fling it on!”
–Walani, examining when turned on.
“Make it snow!”
–Warly, examining when turned on.
“This area be protected from fires.”
–Woodlegs, examining when turned on.
“TIS FULL”
–Wilba, examining when turned on.
“Keep fire away”
–Wormwood, examining when turned on.
“Nothing keeps fire away like chucking pieces of ice at it.”
–Wheeler, examining when turned on.
“Witness the efficiency of the future!”
–Winona, examining when turned on.
“It is ready to fling at a moment's notice.”
–Wortox, examining when turned on.
“Good machine!”
–Wurt, examining when turned on.
“That should keep us from setting the camp on fire... hopefully.”
–Walter, examining when turned on.
“It's a good thing we prepared for just such an eventuality.”
–Wanda, examining when turned on.
The Ice Flingomatic is a craftable Structure from the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 2 Gears, 15 Ice, and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Ice Flingomatic can be turned on and off by the player. When turned on, the Ice Flingomatic will automatically launch snowballs to extinguish any smoldering objects or Fires, within its range. This also includes Campfires, Fire Pits, Night Lights, and Endothermic Fires. It will not target players holding Torches (or Willow's Lighter).
The Ice Flingomatic has a limited fuel tank, indicated by a red gauge on the front of the unit. A full tank will last 5 days and can be refueled with any fuel substances, such as Logs (9%) or Rot (3%), as well as Nitre (19%), Glommer's Goop (50%). As long as the Ice Flingomatic is turned on, it will consume fuel over time. Extinguishing fires and reviving withered plants do not consume additional fuel.
The Ice Flingomatic will target Farms and withered Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, and Saplings, allowing them to be harvested normally throughout Summer.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Ice Flingomatic can be flooded.
In the Hamlet DLC, Wormwood can be frozen by Ice Flingomatics.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Since structures can catch on fire during Summer, a Flingomatic can safeguard one's most important structures (e.g. Chests). However careful planning is required so that the Fire Pits and Endothermic Fire Pits are not inside the Flingomatic's area.
The Ice Flingomatic can lob snowballs over all types of Walls.
The Ice Flingomatic will instantly freeze Mobs that are hit by the Snowballs. Players can exploit this to their advantage and stunlock mobs.
Activating the Ice Flingomatic before leaving the area in the Summer will prevent fires from starting or spreading upon return.
The Ice Flingomatic's range is a 9 tile diameter (from the center of the 4th tile across). This applies in both the horizontal and vertical direction (Also about 2 tiles diagonally from center).
When placing Plants around a base, one should position them so that an Ice Flingomatic can function as a sprinkler during the Summer, maintaining them as renewable resources and protecting them from spontaneous combustion.
Despite the high cost of construction and operation, the machine cannot put out extensive fires by itself, requiring more than one.
Having a pre-built Flingomatic in a player's Science tab will allow a player to measure the range of an already placed Flingomatic at any time. This can be done by selecting it from the Science tab and hovering over the placed Flingomatic. When finished, right-clicking will cancel the placement of the new one.
The Ice Flingomatic can fail to stop crops from withering during Summer if they are planted in quick succession. The problem can be avoided by waiting for the Ice Flingomatic's animation to complete between each Seed when planting multiple Seeds.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Sometimes when plants such as Berry Bushes are placed too close to the Ocean, the snowballs launched by the machine won't be able to land.
Sometimes, when harvesting a plant, the Ice Flingomatic will fire snowballs at it indefinitely.
This may also result in a column of snowballs traveling through the world in a straight direction.
Sometimes the Ice Flingomatic stops throwing snowballs at withered plants. Relogging usually fixes this issue.
An Ice Flingomatic may auto target Limpet Rocks and never target anything else.
Thrown snowballs can sometimes get stuck in the air. This typically affects a single snowball from a stream, so the Ice Flingomatic should still be able to put out fires.
Tree seeds extinguished by Ice Flingomatic planted automatically on save/load.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Ice Flingomatic's building silhouette showing that its radius is 11 units of wall.
Approximate total snowball splash area
A turned off Ice Flingomatic that has used some fuel.
An Ice Flingomatic throwing snowballs at two burning Drying Racks.
The Flingomatic being used to freeze mobs near a fire.
A Flingomatic in Emergency Mode detecting and subsequently automatically attempting to extinguish a group of burning Saplings in DST. Note the red light when responding to the emergency instead of the normal green one.

It requires 2 [[Gears]], 15 [[Ice]], and 2 [[Electrical Doodad]]s to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The Ice Flingomatic can be turned on and off by the player. When turned on, the Ice Flingomatic will automatically launch snowballs to extinguish any smoldering objects or [[Fire]]s, within its range. This also includes [[Campfire]]s, [[Fire Pit]]s, [[Night Light]]s, and [[Endothermic Fire]]s. It will not target players holding [[Torch]]es (or [[Willow's Lighter]]). The Ice Flingomatic has a limited fuel tank, indicated by a red gauge on the front of the unit. A full tank will last 5 [[day]]s and can be refueled with any [[:Category:Fuel|fuel]] substances, such as [[Logs]] (9%) or [[Rot]] (3%), as well as [[Nitre]] (19%), [[Glommer's Goop]] (50%). As long as the Ice Flingomatic is turned on, it will consume fuel over time. Extinguishing fires and reviving withered plants do not consume additional fuel. The Ice Flingomatic will target [[Farm]]s and withered [[Berry Bush]]es, [[Grass Tuft]]s, and [[Sapling]]s, allowing them to be harvested normally throughout [[Summer]]. == {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, the Ice Flingomatic can be [[Flooding|flooded]]. In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, [[Wormwood]] can be frozen by Ice Flingomatics. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Since structures can catch on fire during Summer, a Flingomatic can safeguard one's most important structures (e.g. Chests). However careful planning is required so that the Fire Pits and [[Endothermic Fire Pit]]s are not inside the Flingomatic's area. * The Ice Flingomatic can lob snowballs over all types of [[Wall]]s. * The Ice Flingomatic will instantly freeze [[Mobs]] that are hit by the Snowballs. Players can exploit this to their advantage and stunlock mobs. * Activating the Ice Flingomatic before leaving the area in the Summer will prevent fires from starting or spreading upon return. * The Ice Flingomatic's range is a 9 tile diameter (from the center of the 4th tile across). This applies in both the horizontal and vertical direction (Also about 2 tiles diagonally from center). * When placing [[Plants#Collectible Plants|Plants]] around a base, one should position them so that an Ice Flingomatic can function as a sprinkler during the Summer, maintaining them as renewable resources and protecting them from spontaneous combustion. * Despite the high cost of construction and operation, the machine cannot put out extensive fires by itself, requiring more than one. * Having a pre-built Flingomatic in a player's Science tab will allow a player to measure the range of an already placed Flingomatic at any time. This can be done by selecting it from the Science tab and hovering over the placed Flingomatic. When finished, right-clicking will cancel the placement of the new one. * The Ice Flingomatic can fail to stop crops from withering during Summer if they are planted in quick succession. The problem can be avoided by waiting for the Ice Flingomatic's animation to complete between each Seed when planting multiple Seeds. == {{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs == * Sometimes when plants such as Berry Bushes are placed too close to the Ocean, the snowballs launched by the machine won't be able to land. * Sometimes, when harvesting a plant, the Ice Flingomatic will fire snowballs at it indefinitely. ** This may also result in a column of snowballs traveling through the world in a straight direction. * Sometimes the Ice Flingomatic stops throwing snowballs at withered plants. Relogging usually fixes this issue. * An Ice Flingomatic may auto target [[Limpet Rock]]s and never target anything else. * Thrown snowballs can sometimes get stuck in the air.
